name: 🚀 Feature Request

labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''

## 🎯 User Stories

<!-- Write user stories in the format: "As a [role], I want [feature] so that [benefit]" -->

## ✨ Expected Benefits

<!-- What are the expected benefits of this feature? -->

- [ ] Improved user experience
- [ ] Increased productivity
- [ ] Time savings
- [ ] Better data insights
- [ ] Enhanced collaboration
- [ ] Reduced errors
- [ ] Other: 



## 📈 Impact Assessment

### User Impact
<!-- How many users would benefit from this? -->

- [ ] 🔵 **All users** - Everyone will benefit
- [ ] 🟣 **Most users** - Majority will use this
- [ ] 🟢 **Some users** - Specific user segment
- [ ] 🟡 **Few users** - Niche use case

### Business Value
<!-- What's the business value? -->

- [ ] 🔴 **Critical** - Core business requirement
- [ ] 🟠 **High** - Significant competitive advantage
- [ ] 🟡 **Medium** - Nice to have, good ROI
- [ ] 🟢 **Low** - Small incremental improvement

### Urgency
<!-- How urgent is this feature? -->

- [ ] 🚨 **Urgent** - Blocking users, needed ASAP
- [ ] ⚡ **High** - Needed for upcoming milestone
- [ ] ⏰ **Medium** - Would be nice for next quarter
- [ ] 📅 **Low** - Future consideration



## 🛠️ Technical Considerations

<!-- Any technical aspects to consider? -->

### Technical Complexity
<!-- How complex do you think this is to implement? -->

- [ ] 🟢 **Simple** - Minor changes, quick implementation
- [ ] 🟡 **Moderate** - Requires some architectural changes
- [ ] 🟠 **Complex** - Significant development effort
- [ ] 🔴 **Very Complex** - Major architectural changes

<!-- What parts of the system would this touch? -->

### Data/Privacy Considerations
<!-- Any data or privacy concerns? -->

- [ ] No sensitive data involved
- [ ] Requires new data collection
- [ ] Impacts user privacy
- [ ] Requires compliance review

## 🧑‍💻 Willingness to Contribute

<!-- Are you willing to help implement this feature? -->

- [ ] I'd like to implement this feature myself
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can help with documentation
- [ ] I can help with design/mockups
- [ ] I'm just suggesting the idea



## ✅ Feature Request Checklist

<!-- Ensure you've completed these before submitting -->

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to make sure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem this feature solves
- [ ] I have provided use cases and user stories
- [ ] I have considered alternative solutions
- [ ] I have assessed the impact and priority
- [ ] I have added relevant labels and context

<sub>
💡 **Note:** Feature requests are reviewed regularly. High-impact features aligned with our roadmap are prioritized. Join our [Discord community](https://discord.gg/cohortix) to discuss your ideas with the team!
</sub>
